final_prompt.prompt:
Create an infographic poster illustrating step-by-step instructions for deploying Hermes inside a Docker container and integrating GLMCodingPlan, with clearly labeled steps 1 2 3 4.

Style/medium: clean flat vector infographic, technical documentation style, isometric icon accents
Composition: vertical single-column layout, each step in its own numbered panel, top-to-bottom reading flow
Subject: four clearly labeled steps — Step 1: pull/build Docker image for Hermes; Step 2: run and configure the Docker container; Step 3: install and configure GLMCodingPlan inside the container; Step 4: verify integration and test connection — each panel contains a simplified terminal/command illustration and a short label
Scene/backdrop: neutral light gray background, subtle grid or blueprint texture
Lighting/mood: flat, no shadows, clean technical clarity
Color palette: deep navy blue as primary structural color, bright teal as accent for step numbers, white for panel backgrounds, monochrome code snippets
Text (verbatim): "1" "2" "3" "4" "Hermes" "Docker" "GLMCodingPlan"
Constraints: step numbers must be visually prominent and unambiguous; layout must read clearly at A4 print size; icons must remain legible at small scale
Avoid: gradients, photorealistic textures, decorative flourishes, cluttered backgrounds, generic Behance poster style, stuffer aesthetic
